keyFindings.description: Type assertion `parts as Array<{ type: 'text'; text: string }>` casts heterogeneous array (may contain agent parts) to text-only type. Works at runtime but bypasses type safety.
Zero new tests for the new feature. Config parsing, OpenCode adapter agentName, server dispatch modeAgents lookup, and Claude Code adapter unused param are all untested despite existing test files.
agentName lookup inside retry loop but value never changes between attempts. Could be hoisted.
No validation of agent name values. Invalid agent names pass config parsing and only fail at runtime.
